message:
test(oracle): add conformance tests for REPLACE, INSERT SELECT, index queries, numeric edges

3 new conformance oracle tests: REPLACE INTO + INSERT...SELECT + multi-row
INSERT, index-ordered queries with single/composite indexes, and numeric edge
cases (overflow, division by zero, float precision, round midpoints).
All pass with 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
